## Summary

Describe the community/process/docs change.

## Type

- [ ] Community docs
- [ ] Proposal or RFC
- [ ] Issue/discussion template
- [ ] Roadmap or repository map
- [ ] Other

## Safety Check

- [ ] No credentials, private keys, tokens, or secrets
- [ ] No customer telemetry or private incident data
- [ ] No live malware samples or exploit payloads
- [ ] Security-sensitive details are routed through private disclosure

## Links

Add related issues, discussions, RFCs, or component repositories.
